  1. de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions

Uses of Package
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions

Packages that use de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.useractions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.help
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.nodeviews

de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.proofdiff
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings
This package provides a facility for a settings UI.
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
This package contains the graphical user interface of the test generation backend.
org.key_project.exploration.actions
 
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.gui
 
org.key_project.isabelletranslation.gui.controller
 
org.key_project.slicing.ui
 
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    Class
    Description
    AutoModeAction
     
    ExitMainAction
     
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions
    Class
    Description
    EditMostRecentFileAction.EditFileActionHandler
    The method EditMostRecentFileAction.EditFileActionHandler.workWithFile(File) of the default instance EditMostRecentFileAction.EditFileActionHandler.getInstance() is used by EditMostRecentFileAction to edit the last opened file or to open the last used directory.
    KeyAction
    Common class for all "actions" (menu entries / toolbar buttons) the user can trigger.
    KeYMenuCheckBox
    This class can be used for adding Checkboxes to the menu.
    LemmaGenerationAction
     
    LemmaGenerationAction.Mode
     
    MainWindowAction
    KeyAction extended to automatically override the accelerator key after the default is set using MainWindowAction.setAcceleratorKey(KeyStroke) / MainWindowAction.setAcceleratorLetter(int) using the KeyStrokeManager.
    ShowActiveSettingsAction
    for debugging - opens a window with the settings from current Proof and the default settings
  • Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions used by de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.useractions

    KeyAction
    Common class for all "actions" (menu entries / toolbar buttons) the user can trigger.
